nodes.label: 'Control: gated on the ADMIN role before the destructive action.'
nodes.detail: """Control: gated on the ADMIN role before the destructive action."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #12: the require_role gate its sibling delete_user has is missing.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #12: the require_role gate its sibling delete_user has is missing."""

nodes.label: 'Refundable set {PLACED, PAID}; rejects with 404 - sibling of request_refund.'
nodes.detail: """Refundable set {PLACED, PAID}; rejects with 404 - sibling of request_refund."""

nodes.label: Raise ApiError(422, 'an order needs at least one item')
nodes.detail: raise ApiError(422, "an order needs at least one item")

nodes.label: 'Planted #13: the validation guard create() has is missing here.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #13: the validation guard create() has is missing here."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #7/#8: a divergent refundable set {PAID, SHIPPED, DELIVERED} and a 409\n where t...
nodes.detail: """Planted #7/#8: a divergent refundable set {PAID, SHIPPED, DELIVERED} and a 409 where the sibling cancel() rejects the same kind of state with 404."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #3: dispatches on AccountStatus but omits ACTIVE and PENDING_VERIFICATION.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #3: dispatches on AccountStatus but omits ACTIVE and PENDING_VERIFICATION."""

nodes.label: 'Control: a single-value guard, correctly not flagged.'
nodes.detail: """Control: a single-value guard, correctly not flagged."""

nodes.label: 'Control: a single-value guard (block suspended), not an exhaustive dispatch.'
nodes.detail: """Control: a single-value guard (block suspended), not an exhaustive dispatch."""

nodes.label: Raise ApiError(403, 'suspended accounts cannot reset their password')
nodes.detail: raise ApiError(403, "suspended accounts cannot reset their password")

nodes.label: 'Ensure the account holds the required role, else raise ApiError(403).'
nodes.detail: """Ensure the account holds the required role, else raise ApiError(403)."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #10: a no-op branch (the refunded case does nothing).'
nodes.detail: """Planted #10: a no-op branch (the refunded case does nothing)."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #4: match on order.status with no `case _` default.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #4: match on order.status with no `case _` default."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #14 (sibling B): silently returns on the same invalid-amount path.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #14 (sibling B): silently returns on the same invalid-amount path."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #6: broad-except that swallows the failure (and the dead guard #11).'
nodes.detail: """Planted #6: broad-except that swallows the failure (and the dead guard #11)."""

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try: result = gateway_charge(account, order) except Exception: pass

nodes.label: 'Planted #5: if/elif chain on PaymentResult missing FRAUD_REVIEW and no else.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #5: if/elif chain on PaymentResult missing FRAUD_REVIEW and no else."""

nodes.label: 'Planted #14 (sibling A): logs and alerts on the invalid-amount path.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #14 (sibling A): logs and alerts on the invalid-amount path."""

nodes.label: 'Reference handler: every AccountStatus is handled explicitly, with an else.\n\n This is...
nodes.detail: """Reference handler: every AccountStatus is handled explicitly, with an else. This is the complete-coverage sibling route handlers can be compared with when exploring account-status workflows. """

nodes.label: 'Planted #9: dead code after an unconditional return.'
nodes.detail: """Planted #9: dead code after an unconditional return."""

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { return await charge(request); } catch (error) { // intentionally ignored }

nodes.label: Call loadOrder()
nodes.detail: const order: { status: OrderStatus } = await loadOrder(request);

nodes.label: Call loadAccount()
nodes.detail: const account: { status: AccountStatus } = await loadAccount(request);

nodes.label: Call database.audit.write()
nodes.detail: await database.audit.write({ actorId: user.id, action, reason: order.state, });

nodes.label: Call database.audit.write()
nodes.detail: await database.audit.write({ actorId: user.id, action, reason: user.status, });
